text.title: Screen-Reader Scripts — Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for sr-audit-results.yaml. The engineering hand-off, WCAG rollup, and regression-tracking dashboards all consume this file.

forbidden.pattern: step status == "pass" without `actual_observed` field — no evidence
component tested on only one platform when ≥2 platforms apply
versions block missing any tested screen-reader version
wcag_sc field empty for any step
overall_status == "pass" while blockers list is non-empty
audit_id reused across builds — every build gets a new audit_id

allowed-transformations.transformation: Skip a script step explicitly with `status: "skipped", reason: "not applicable to this build"` — never silently omit.
Add platform variants (e.g. JAWS) by extending versions and results_per_platform with the new platform key.
Aggregate "warning" status for verbose-but-passing utterances; this is informational, not a fail.

list.item: Every component has results on all applicable platforms
Every step has an actual_observed value (recording, screenshot, or transcribed utterance)
Versions block captures the exact stack tested
Blockers list correctly populated; no "pass with blockers" inconsistencies
WCAG rollup matches the per-step failures
